title: Academy Dean
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Academy Dean''' was the head of the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]]. He lived in the [[Dean's Residence]]. [[ZZ-4Z]] served seventeen Deans, the last being [[Horace Wyrmyr]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''
